description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 17 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 14 mins. His tracked work was split mostly across Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, with smaller amounts of SQL and other languages. The activity data shows 3 tracked projects and no new GitHub commits, pull requests, or repositories.
